title: Attendance: Open/Closed Campus
description: Conroe ISD's campus access rules determine whether students are allowed to leave school grounds during the school day, such as during lunch or free periods. Schools may operate as "closed campuses," requiring students to remain on school property, or as "open campuses," permitting students to leave under certain conditions. Understanding these rules helps families know what to expect regarding their student's whereabouts and safety during school hours.
